reviews.comment:
Lindo para pasar la tarde y no se llena, además no es caro. Pero los precios en lista ya no eran así que me decepciono en que no los saquen.

(Translated by Google)
Nice place to spend the afternoon, and it doesn't get crowded, plus it's not expensive. But the listed prices weren't there anymore, so I'm disappointed they haven't shown them.
